interventions.name: A2 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: algorithm comparison tasks with explicit correctness, step-count, and clarity criteria

interventions.name: A2 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: subproblem-mapping routines that require each part to connect to the whole solution

interventions.name: A2 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: why-this-solution-is-better prompts tied to one named criterion

interventions.name: A2 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: near-transfer redesign tasks that preserve structure while changing a bounded task detail
